mnemonics: UNDERSTAND The Problem Clearly (UTPC): Understand, Techniques, Design, Analyze, Verify
keyPoints: An algorithm is a sequence of unambiguous instructions for solving a problem.
Algorithmic problem solving involves understanding the problem, designing a solution, analyzing efficiency, and coding.
Important problem types include sorting, searching, string processing, graph problems, combinatorial problems, and geometric problems.
commonMistakes: Not fully understanding the problem constraints before designing a solution.
Confusing time complexity (efficiency over time) with space complexity (efficiency in memory usage).
Assuming a correct algorithm is automatically efficient without analyzing its complexity.
